title: Daoist Canon: Sanguan Jing (Three Officials) (Section 1)
description: From the Daoist Canon: Sanguan Jing (Three Officials)
introduction: From the Daoist Canon: Sanguan Jing (Three Officials)

translation.text: From the Sanguan Jing (Three Officials) of the Daoist Canon: One of the foundational scriptures of Chinese Taoism, preserving teachings on internal alchemy, meditation, ritual, and the cultivation of immortality.
